# Diners Club Privilege Credit Card
If the world is where you belong, Welcome to the Club
  * 'Buy One Get One' On BookMyShow
  * 5x Reward Points On Swiggy & Zomato
  * 8 Free Airport Lounge Access Worldwide


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG "Apply Now")
![Diners Privilege Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/diners-club-privilege-desktop?fmt=webp)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/pdf/common/Credit-Cards/Diners-Privilege-Product-Feature-Change.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card effective 15th May 2026.
What's In Store For You

## More Benefits Than Ever Before
Lifestyle Benefits
  * Buy 1 Get 1 on weekend movie tickets, up to 2 free tickets every calendar month, up to a value of Rs. 250 per ticket  
  

  * Rs. 1500 worth of voucher of top brands like Marriott Experience, Barbeque Nation, Lakme Salon, O2 Spa, Decathlon, McDonalds or Dominos on quarterly milestone spend of Rs. 1.5 Lakhs


Reward Point Benefits
  * 5X Reward Points on online food orders on Swiggy, Zomato, 4 points for every ₹200 spent elsewhere, and up to 10X points on spends via SmartBuy.


Travel Benefits
  * Enjoy 2 domestic and 1 international lounge visits per calendar quarter by spending Rs. 60,000 in the previous quarter.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card#a "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### Top Features
  * Buy 1 Get 1 on weekend movie tickets, up to 2 free tickets every calendar month, up to a value of Rs. 250 per ticket
  * 5X Reward Points on online food orders on Swiggy and Zomato, additional 4X RP capped at 2500 Reward points per calendar month
  * Complimentary Annual Memberships of Swiggy One & Times Prime as Welcome Benefit on Rs. 75,000 spends in first 90 days of card issuance
  * ₹ 1,500 worth Marriott, Decathlon & more vouchers on quarterly spends of Rs. 1.5 lakh
  * 2 Complimentary Airport lounge access every calendar quarter worldwide
  * 4 Reward Points for every ₹ 200 spent
  * For details and T&C, please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card/pdf/diners-privilege-tnc-updated-May-2026.pdf)


View More 
![Diners Club Privilege Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Additional Benefits
  * Interest Free Credit Period: Up to 50 days of interest free credit period on your HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card from the date of purchase. (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant)
  * Foreign Currency Markup: Nominal 3.5% on all your foreign currency spends.  
(These charges are billed on your subsequent statement within 60 days from date of visit. Currency conversion rate is applicable as on the date of settlement)
  * Revolving Credit: Available at a nominal interest rate on your HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Privilege Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Welcome Benefits
  * Avail Complimentary Annual memberships of Swiggy One and Times Prime on spending Rs 75,000 within the first 90 days of card issuance.
  * Easily track your milestone spends and redeem benefits by following these steps. Visit [http://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners_privilege(opens in a new tab)](http://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners_privilege/) >> Click on 'Milestones' tab >> Check Welcome Benefits.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card/pdf/diners-privilege-tnc-updated-May-2026.pdf) for T&C


View More 
![Diners Club Privilege Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Milestone Benefits
  * Avail Rs 1500 worth of vouchers of Marriott Experience, Barbeque Nation, Lakme Salon, O2 Spa, Decathlon, McDonalds or Dominos on quarterly milestone spend of Rs. 1.5 Lakhs
  * Easily track your milestone spends and redeem benefits by following these steps. Visit <http://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners_privilege/>[(opens in a new tab)](http://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners_privilege/) >> Click on 'Milestones' tab >> Check Welcome Benefits
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card/pdf/diners-privilege-tnc-updated-May-2026.pdf) for T&C


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Dining & Entertainment Benefits
  * 'Buy 1 Get 1 Free' on movie/non-movie weekend tickets via BookMyShow. Offer is applicable for shows on Friday, Saturday and Sunday (irrespective of booking day). Maximum discount is Rs. 250/ticket, up to 2 free tickets every calendar month.
  * 5X Reward Points on online food orders on Swiggy and Zomato, additional 4X RP capped at 2500 Reward points per calendar month
  * Extra 10% off on Dineout bill on participating restaurants.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card/pdf/diners-privilege-tnc-updated-May-2026.pdf) for T&C


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lounge Access Benefits
  * 2 Complimentary Airport lounge access every calendar quarter worldwide for Primary & Addon cardholders in total (guest access is not part of the program).
  * Please [click here(opens in a new tab)](http://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/hdfc-diners-privilege) to view Domestic Lounges
  * Please refer Diners Travel Tool App for International Lounges
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/lounge-tnc.pdf) for TnC


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Reward Points & Redemption Benefits
**Reward Points Accrual:**
  * Earn 4 Reward Points on every Rs.200 retail* spends
  * Earn 20 Reward Points on every Rs. 200 spent on Swiggy and Zomato online food delivery orders
  * Earn up to 10X Reward Points on Spends Via Smartbuy
**Reward Point Redemption:**
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on Smartbuy or NetBanking.  
  

  * Flights and hotel bookings via Smartbuy at a value of 1 RP = Rs 0.5
  * Redeem Rewards Points on exclusive reward redemption catalogue for HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card 1 RP upto Rs 0.35
  * Cashback at a value of 1 RP = Rs 0.20.
  * To access SmartBuy, please click on Visit <http://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners_privilege/>


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance & Comprehensive Protection Benefits
  * Air accident insurance cover worth $125,000*
  * Emergency overseas hospitalization: $31,250*
  * Travel Insurance Cover of up to $625 on baggage delay
  * Credit Liability Cover of up to ₹ 9 Lakh*
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx) to update Nominee Details.
  * *[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card/pdf/diners_privilege_insurance_policy.pdf) for more details regarding Policy cover.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefits-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering If You Are Eligible?
Salaried
  * Nationality: Indian National
  * Age: 21 – 60 years
  * Net Salary (Monthly) - ₹35,000


Self-Employed
  * Nationality:Indian National
  * Age: 21 – 65 years
  * Annual ITR > ₹6,00,000


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Save up to ₹28,000 * annually just like 33 lakh+ Diners Club Privilege Credit Card Holders 
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_dc_privilege&icid=website_dc_privilege#nbb "Apply Now")
![Dinners club black credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents Required To Get You Started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement 
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_dc_privilege&icid=website_dc_privilege#nbb "Apply Now")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know More About The Card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Reward Point Redemption

###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹1,000/- + Applicable Taxes
  * Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in a year, before your Credit Card renewal date and get your renewal fee waived off.


[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) to view details of HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card Fees and Charges.
![Fees & Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Reward Point Redemption 
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](http://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners_privilege/) or [NetBanking(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/).
  * Reward Points Redemption against each category can be redeemed at:

  
| **1 Reward Point Equivalent to**  |  
| --- |  
| SmartBuy (Flight and hotel bookings)  | ₹0.5  |  
| Exclusive Catalogue  | Up to ₹0.35  |  
| Select restaurants  | ₹0.50  |  
| Cashback  | up to ₹0.20  |  
*For detailed TandC on Reward Points Program [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/personal-mitc)
[Click here,](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/claim-rewards) for further details on the process to redeem Reward Points
![Reward Point Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Smart EMI 
  * HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card comes with an option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase.
  * To know more [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi)
  * Enjoy attractive interest rates and conveniently repay over 9 to 36 months.
  * Get credit into your HDFC Bank Account in seconds. 
  * The loan is pre-approved so no documentation is required.


![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Customer Care 
HDFC Phone Banking: For any queries, call us on 1800 1600 / 1800 2600 (from 8 a.m. to 8p.m.) Customers travelling overseas can reach us at 022- 61606160 Smartbuy Concierge: Simply call on 1860 425 1188
![pd-smart-emi](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Interest-free Credit Period 
  * Get up to 50 days of interest free Credit from the date of purchase. (subject to submission of the charge by the Merchant)


![Interest-free Credit Period](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Revolving Credit 
The HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card offers revolving credit at a nominal interest rate.
  * Revolving credit allows you to use a line of credit up to a specified limit without a fixed number of payments.
  * You have the flexibility to use the funds as needed and only pay interest on the amount used.
  * This facility ensures continuous access to funds, making it a valuable emergency cash reserve for unexpected financial challenges.
  * For details, please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-privilege-credit-card/pdf/diners_privilege_tnc.pdf)


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_dc_privilege&icid=website_dc_privilege#nbb).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/) to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/) and our staff will help you with the application.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What are the benefits of the HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card?
The Diners Club Privilege Credit Card offers several exclusive benefits. Cardholders enjoy a range of privileges, including 'Buy 1 Get 1 Free' on entertainment through BookMyShow, 5X reward points on popular dining platforms, and quarterly vouchers as milestone benefits on spends, along with two complimentary airport lounge accesses every quarter, enhancing the travel experience, and so much more!
###  Does the Diners Club Privilege Credit Card have lounge access?
Yes, the Diners Club Privilege Credit Card provides complimentary lounge access. Cardholders can enjoy the luxury of two airport lounge accesses every calendar quarter, adding a touch of exclusivity to their travel experience. This feature is designed to make journeys more comfortable and enjoyable for Diners Club Privilege members.
###  Does Diners Club Privilege Credit Card have a Priority Pass?
Diners Club Privilege Credit Cardholders enjoy the privilege of a Priority Pass membership. This membership grants access to a vast network of airport lounges globally. With Priority Pass, cardholders can relax in style and comfort while waiting for their flights, making travel a more pleasant and leisurely experience. You need not apply to get a Physical Priority Pass. Your card itself acts as a Priority Pass. You simply need to register on Diners Travel Tool App.
###  Is the Diners Club Privilege Credit Card free?
While the HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card comes with a lot of benefits, it is not free. Cardholders typically incur an annual fee/renewal membership of ₹1000+ GST, giving access to the exclusive features and rewards associated with this Credit Card. The annual fee is compensated by a range of benefits such as welcome bonus, milestone benefits and reward points.
###  What are the documents required for the HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card?
Documents required for the Diners Club Privilege Credit Card include:
**Identity Proof**
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs 


**Address Proof**
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


**Income Proof**  

  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


### 
What are the annual Fee and Charges for the HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card?
Membership Fee: ₹1,000 + applicable taxes   
Renewal Fee Waiver: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in a year before renewal and enjoy a fee waiver, rewarding your spending.
### 
How to Use the HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card?
You can swipe or tap (in certain cases) your HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card in any place. Here are some instances:
#### Explore Offers
Maximise the 10X Reward Points by using the card to find offers and discounts on the SmartBuy platform.
#### Dining Out
Enjoy exclusive dining privileges and up to 20% discounts at partner restaurants via the Good Food Trail programme.
#### Contactless Payments
Leverage the convenience of contactless payments for transactions up to ₹5,000 at various retail outlets. 
### 
How to Apply for the HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card?
Apply for the HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card online by clicking [here.(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG&icid=website_organic_herobanner_dinersclubprivilegecreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb) Submit the required documents, online or by visiting your nearest branch. Upon approval, get your new HDFC Bank Diners Club Privilege Credit Card. 
View More 
### Travel smart, live privileged.
  * Lounge access
  * BoGo on BookMyShow
  * Welcome vouchers
